subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Abha Beauty! Thy spiritual letter was read, and the divine fragrance thereof was inhaled. Glory be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی نامه روحانی تلاوت شد نفحه رحمانی استشمام گشت سبحان
subcodes.subjects: @reward and punishment, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice and mercy, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
